title: 🌙 Night UI - A Dark Themed Resource Pack
description: Immerse yourself in a mysterious, night themed resource pack
body:
![Night UI Banner](https://nottobla.me/resource-packs/night-ui/assets/banner.png)

🌙 **NightUI** is a dark-themed Minecraft resource pack focused on clarity, comfort, and compatibility. It replaces the vanilla interface with a clean, minimalist design that’s lightweight, easy on the eyes, and compatible with other resource packs — ideal for late-night play or users who prefer a sleek, distraction-free UI. ## Legacy4J Compatibility 🌙 NightUI integrates seamlessly with **[Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)** — a mod that restores the look and feel of the legacy console editions of Minecraft. With NightUI applied, the retro interface becomes easier on the eyes. ## Future Plans ### Configuration Website A dedicated NightUI configuration site is currently in development. This tool will allow users to: - Toggle specific UI features on or off - Select only the mod support they need for lighter, optimized builds - Choose from presets tailored to popular modpacks This system will make it easier to support a broader range of mods and give users more control over their experience. ### Version Backports NightUI is currently designed for the latest Minecraft versions. However, plans are in place to backport the pack for broader compatibility across older versions of the game. ### Bedrock Edition Support A Bedrock-compatible version of NightUI is also in the works, allowing Bedrock players to enjoy the night.
Mod Support 🌙 NightUI provides support for the following mods: - [DeathLog](https://modrinth.com/mod/deathlog) - [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) / [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) Want support for another mod? [Request it on Discord →](https://discord.gg/2kprrpbDfK)
License 🌙 NightUI is © NotToBlame. You are permitted to: - ✅ Use in modpacks **if downloaded from official sources** (Modrinth, CurseForge) - ✅ Create and publish **addon packs** (as long as no original files are included) - ✅ Make **personal edits** (not for redistribution) You may **not**: - ❌ Reupload or redistribute this pack or its assets - ❌ Include original files in your own uploads or forks - ❌ Use the pack commercially without explicit permission [Read the full license →](https://www.nottobla.me/assets/license.md)
